memory_entries.text: SQLite product dataset schema: group g1 is primarily Office Products (items_g1 main_cat has 13,933 Office Products), with reviews in fdbk_g1 joined by ref_id and price in items_g1.prc. For average review rating (individual reviews) use AVG(fdbk_g1.rtg) after joining to items_g1; item-level avg_rtg is available but not the same.
